description:
🕒 07:30–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-logcamp-bonomine-earlysummer/

【RECRUITMENT CLOSED】This tour has been suspended by the organizer.

This tour teaches the basics of stream wading on the beautiful Shiratani Gorge route, aiming for Stick Peak summit and enjoying gorge exploration. Lunch and dinner feature carefully prepared bento boxes and a meal from a game meat (jibié) restaurant, with educational information about wild game cuisine.

【Fee】¥23,000 per person (includes guide, lunch and dinner, insurance)

【Capacity】5 people

【Guide】Tsuyoshi Shinohara (Japan Mountain Guides Association member, climbing guide stage III)

【What to bring】20-liter backpack (waterproof preparation essential), full stream-wading gear, change of clothes, helmet, harness, climbing equipment, bus fare, bathing fee, train fare
location: 集合 西武池袋線「飯能駅」改札口
summary: ℹ️ RECRUITMENT CLOSED: Stick Peak & Gorge wading adventure with source stream walk and game meat dinner
